sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './HowItWorks.css'; const HowItWorks = () => { return (
{/* Header Section */}

🚀 How MindMatch Works

Discover how our platform helps you find your ideal career path and connect with expert mentors

Go to Dashboard Start Career Quiz
{/* Quick Overview */}

🎯 Quick Overview

📝

Take Assessment

Complete our comprehensive career quiz to discover your strengths and interests

👤

Build Profile

Create your professional profile with skills, education, and career goals

🤝

Get Matched

Connect with mentors who match your career interests and aspirations

📊

Track Progress

Monitor your career development journey with real-time progress tracking

{/* Data Flow Diagram */}

📊 System Architecture & Data Flow

Understand how your data moves through our platform to provide personalized career guidance

{/* Row 1: User Input */}
👤
User Input
• Quiz Answers & Preferences • Profile Data & Skills • Career Interests & Goals
↓
{/* Row 2: Frontend Processing */}
⚛️
Frontend (React)
• Form Validation • Real-time Updates • User Interface
→
{/* Row 3: API Layer */}
🔗
API Layer
• RESTful APIs • JWT Authentication • Data Validation
↓
{/* Row 4: Backend Processing */}
⚙️
Backend (Node.js)
• Business Logic • Data Processing • Algorithm Execution
→
{/* Row 5: Database */}
💾
Database (MongoDB)
• Users Collection • Mentors Collection • Quiz Data
↑
{/* Row 6: Matching Engine */}
🤖
Matching Engine
• Career Path Analysis • Mentor Matching • Skill Gap Detection
→
{/* Row 7: Results Delivery */}
📱
Results & Dashboard
• Personalized Recommendations • Progress Tracking • Mentor Connections
{/* Technical Architecture */}

🛠️ Technical Stack

Frontend

React.js User Interface Framework
React Router Navigation & Routing
Context API State Management
CSS3 Styling & Responsive Design

Backend

Node.js Runtime Environment
Express.js Web Framework
JWT Authentication
REST APIs Data Communication

Database

MongoDB NoSQL Database
Mongoose ODM Library
Collections Data Organization
Aggregation Data Processing
{/* API Endpoints */}

🔗 API Endpoints & Data Flow

User Management

POST /api/auth/signup Create new user account
POST /api/auth/login User authentication
GET /api/profile Fetch user profile
PUT /api/profile Update user profile

Career Assessment

POST /api/quiz/submit Submit quiz answers
GET /api/quiz/history Get quiz results
GET /api/quiz/recommendations Get career recommendations

Mentor System

GET /api/mentors Browse available mentors
POST /api/mentors/request Request mentorship
GET /api/mentors/my-requests Get mentorship requests

Progress Tracking

GET /api/progress Get user progress
GET /api/progress/stats Get progress statistics
{/* Database Schema */}

🗃️ Database Collections

Users Collection

_id ObjectId
name String
email String
password String (hashed)
profile Object
quizResults Array
mentorRequests Array

Mentors Collection

_id ObjectId
name String
email String
title String
company String
specialization Array
availability String
skills Array
experience String
{/* User Journey */}

🎯 User Journey

1

Sign Up & Assessment

Create your account and complete the comprehensive career assessment quiz. Your answers are analyzed to understand your strengths, interests, and personality traits.

  • Data stored in Users collection
  • Quiz results processed by matching algorithm
  • Initial career recommendations generated
2

Profile Completion

Build your professional profile by adding skills, education background, work experience, and career interests. This enhances matching accuracy.

  • Profile data updated in real-time
  • Skills analyzed for gap identification
  • Progress tracking initialized
3

Mentor Matching

Our algorithm matches you with suitable mentors based on your career goals, skills, and interests. Browse profiles and request mentorship.

  • Real-time matching with Mentors collection
  • Request management system
  • Communication channel setup
4

Career Development

Continue your professional growth with mentor guidance, skill development, and career advancement opportunities tailored to your goals.

  • Personalized learning paths
  • Skill development tracking
  • Career milestone achievements
); }; export default HowItWorks;
